meta.name: Paul Norton
meta.tagline: Senior Linux Cloud Engineer | Secure Infrastructure & DevOps | AI/ML & Automation Enthusiast

about: Senior Linux Cloud Engineer with over a decade of experience building and securing application infrastructure and platforms. I specialize in designing, implementing, and optimizing secure, scalable solutions using containers, Kubernetes, and advanced automation techniques. My expertise extends to AI/ML infrastructure, ensuring robust and efficient data pipelines and model deployment. A core member at HackersGuildPGH, I actively contribute to the community by teaching 3D printing and HomeLab techniques, fostering innovation and knowledge sharing.
